passive.name: Dimensional Rift
passive.description:
Nolan's skills will leave a Rift. When a rift comes into contact with another rift, they will activate and pull enemies to their center and deal 240 (+140% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage after a short delay. Each time a rift activation hits an enemy, Nolan will gain 20 Energy. If an enemy is hit by multiple rift activations, the damage after the first hit will be reduced by 40%.
Cosmic Leap: If Nolan does not deal or take damage for 5s, he enhances his next Basic Attack to dash to the target, dealing (120% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a Rift. (Damage to and from Minions or Creeps will not prevent Nolan from getting this effect).
|quote=The father who swore to protect his shining star.

skill1.name: Expansion
skill1.description:
Nolan cuts a rectangular area in front of him with his cosmic gauge, dealing 230 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and leaving a Rift at the first enemy hit.
|quote=The scholar that explored the edge of the universe.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=2.5/2.2/1.9/1.6/1.3/1.0
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=230/280/330/380/430/480

skill2.name: Gauge
skill2.description:
Nolan charges in the target direction and slashes with his cosmic gauge, dealing 70 (+13% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage to enemies in his path and leaving a Rift.
|quote=The wayfinder that measured the distance of the stars.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=2.5/2.2/1.9/1.6/1.3/1.0
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=70/100/130/160/190/220

ultimate.name: Fracture
ultimate.description:
Nolan slashes at the target location 3 times, dealing 120 (+50% Extra Physical Attack) Physical Damage with each slash while leaving 3 rifts and slowing the target hit by 30% for 0.5s. The rifts will be activated automatically while Nolan dashes backward.
|quote=The hero that finally returned home.
|stats1=Cooldown|stats1_value=21.0/18.0/15.0
|stats2=Base Damage|stats2_value=120/150/180
